title: Test 3min — VibeVoice 1.5B (Microsoft, free, single-pass multi-speaker)
description: Engine A/B test, identical script (Musk vs OpenAI v14 cold open + sub-question 1, 14 turns/543 words). Engine: Microsoft VibeVoice-1.5B (open-source, MIT, runs locally on Apple Silicon). Native multi-speaker single-pass rendering — no segment seams.
